ai_summary: Accelya Solutions India Limited has submitted a routine compliance filing to the stock exchanges, enclosing a certificate from KFin Technologies Limited for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. This document confirms the company's Registrar and Transfer Agent has adhered to Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, regarding the processing of dematerialized/rematerialized securities. The filing indicates standard operational compliance, with no material financial impact or red flags identified.
